market_scope.resolution_source: Station-linked source / Weather Underground style whole-degree daily high

ensemble.coverage_note: Individual ensemble members are available only for the final trailing days in this archive.
ensemble.recent_member_mean_error_note: Recent ensemble mean daily max was slightly cool on May 4 and close on May 5-6.

detection.rule: Default regime when the day is neither clearly free-heating nor clearly capped by cloud/rain.

detection.note: Small sample; rain in this archive did not necessarily cap the afternoon high.

behavior.sample_note: No material foggy sample in this 58-day Madrid archive.

adjustments.name: mixed_regime
adjustments.reason: Mixed Madrid days still heat after noon, but the expanded sample no longer supports an automatic upward adjustment.

adjustments.name: cloudy_regime
adjustments.reason: Cloudy Madrid days reduced upside, but did not eliminate afternoon heating.

adjustments.name: rainy_regime
adjustments.reason: Rainy Madrid days were still underpredicted by models, but the expanded sample supports a smaller adjustment.

adjustments.name: obs10_above_ecmwf10
adjustments.reason: Observed morning warmth versus ECMWF supports the upper half of the range.

adjustments.name: obs10_below_ecmwf10
adjustments.reason: Observed morning lag versus ECMWF modestly reduces the final high.

intraday_path_rules.max_by_noon_rule: Do not treat noon as close to resolution in Madrid; 3-5C of additional upside after noon is normal.

late_heating_rule.effect: Keep model-centered upper buckets alive unless METAR path is dramatically colder than model.

rain_after_high_rule.condition: new_high_printed after 16 local and subsequent rain_or_temp_drop
rain_after_high_rule.effect: Start locking the current high as primary exact bucket.

sticky_high_rule.effect: Increase confidence that the current high is the final high.

no_new_high_after_17utc_rule.condition: time >= 17 local and no new high for at least one hour
no_new_high_after_17utc_rule.effect: Discount the next higher bucket aggressively.

trading_rules.post_14utc_market_scope: Do not narrow to current high at 14 local; Madrid usually keeps heating into 16-17 local.
trading_rules.skip_condition: If absolute edge is below threshold, do not trade.

scenario_invalidation.condition: fresh_METAR moves at least 1C against the scenario after 16 local

path_break.condition: expected strong afternoon heating fails by 16-17 local

post_peak_confirmation.condition: current_high confirmed by late-day cooling after 16 local

warnings: Do not apply Paris/London noon-resolution logic to Madrid; noon often leaves 3-5C of upside.
Madrid peaks late in this sample, most often around 16-17 local.
Clear days dominate the data and have very large diurnal ranges.
Rainy sample is small and counterintuitive; rain did not reliably suppress the final high in this archive.
Use ensemble percentile logic as a confirmation layer because individual ensemble coverage is only available on the trailing days.

operational_summary.primary_city_filter: Whether the day can maintain strong afternoon heating into 16-17 local
operational_summary.main_post_noon_rule: Madrid usually still has several degrees of upside after noon.
operational_summary.main_post_peak_rule: Only after 16 local should the bot strongly favor the current observed high over model-centered buckets.
